title: Bartoline TX10 Paint and Varnish Stripper 500ml – Extra Strong, Non-Caustic Paint Remover for Wood, Metal & More
features: POWERFUL PAINT & VARNISH REMOVER: Specially formulated to strip multiple layers of paint, varnish, and coatings with ease. Its high-strength formula works effectively on wood, metal, and other surfaces, making it ideal for home renovations and furniture restoration.

SAFE & NON-CAUSTIC FORMULA: Unlike harsh chemical strippers, this non-caustic, Methylene Chloride-free solution is safer to use while still delivering professional-quality results. Perfect for DIY enthusiasts and professional painters looking for a more user-friendly product.

VERSATILE SURFACE COMPATIBILITY: Suitable for removing paint and varnish from wood, metal, stone, and masonry. Works both indoors and outdoors, making it a must-have for furniture stripping, door refinishing, and other restoration projects.

EASY APPLICATION & EFFECTIVE RESULTS: Simply apply a thick coat using a brush, leave it to work, and scrape off softened paint effortlessly. For stubborn coatings, a second application ensures a completely clean and prepared surface for repainting.

EASY CLEANUP & RESIDUE-FREE FINISH: Once the stripping process is complete, wash the treated area with Bartoline Clean Spirit or a mild detergent to remove any residue. Leaves surfaces clean, dry, and ready for refinishing or repainting.
description: Product Description Bartoline TX10 Paint and Varnish Stripper is a highly effective non-Methylene Chloride stripper ideal for use by inexperienced DIYers as well as professional users. The non-caustic formulation is quick and easy to use, both indoors and out, and can remove multiple layers at a time. Box Contains 1 x Bartoline TX10 Paint & Varnish Stripper - 500ml
